timeline.title: Game Development
timeline.description: My first course was a MBO game development course. I followed this course at Media College in Amsterdam.

timeline.title: Internship CaptainVR
timeline.description: This was my first internship for my Game Development course. Within this company I worked on multiple VR Games which purposed served for overcoming fears and phobias.

timeline.title: Internship XRLab
timeline.description: This was me second internship for my Game Development course. Within this company I worked together with a team of more that 25 people to create Augmented Reality and Extended Reality Games for both clients and the company XRLab itself.

timeline.title: Completed Game development
timeline.description: I managed to achieve my diploma for Game Development at the Media College in Amsterdam after completing my final assignment where I made a game for the KM (Koninklijke Marine).

timeline.title: Communication & Multimedia Design
timeline.description: I started my second course which is an HBO course called Communication & Multimedia Design at the Hogeschool van Amsterdam.

timeline.title: Propaedeutic Achieved (Cumlaude)
timeline.description: A year into my Communication & Multimedia Design course I managed to achieve my propaedeutic diploma with a cumlaude distinction (An average score of 8 or higher).

timeline.title: Minor Service Design
timeline.description: In my third year of my Communication & Multimedia Design course I followed a minor called Service Design. This minor is focused on learning how to design and improve services for users.

timeline.title: Minor Web Development
timeline.description: In the second half of my third year of my Communication & Multimedia Design course I followed a minor called Web Development. This minor is focused on learning how to design and develop websites and web applications.

timeline.title: Smashing Conference Amsterdam
timeline.description: While following the Web Development minor I had the oppurtunity to attend the Smashing Conference in Amsterdam. This conference is focused on web development and design and is attended by professionals from all over the world.
